description: Our warehouse needs to group local morning deliveries together to save travel time. Log in to Odoo Inventory as admin/admin. Enable the 'Batch Transfers' feature and process a single Batch Transfer for the 'Ready' delivery orders belonging to Downtown Commercial HVAC, City Metro Transit Authority, Apex Construction, and Riverside Property Management. Validate the batch to mark these four orders as shipped. Do not batch or validate the international freight orders for Toronto Industrial Corp or London Underground Maintenance.
